The article introduces data types in the context of VFL: aligned and unaligned samples, with labels or not. Specifically, it mentions "aligned labeled", "aligned unlabeled", and "unaligned unlabeled" (implied as unaligned unlabeled). So, three types are discussed.

In the pre-training phase of FedHSSL (as described in Section IV.A and Algorithm 1), the framework leverages:
- All available unlabeled samples from each party (i.e., unaligned unlabeled samples of each party)
- Aligned unlabeled samples (used in cross-party SSL)

It does not use aligned labeled samples during pre-training. The aligned labeled samples are used later in the fine-tuning phase.

Therefore, the correct option is:

C
